name: The Dormant Colossus
description: Your imperium's survey ships have woken a sleeping precursor megastructure, and every faction wants its power for their own ends.

cards.prompt: Survey ship Meridian pings a colossal precursor structure adrift at the rim. Its systems stir at your fleet's approach. Do you signal a peaceful survey or seize it as a prize?

rightChoice.text: Claim it by force

cards.prompt: The neighboring Vasari Concord names the structure 'the Loom of the First Ones' and calls it sacred. Their envoy requests a joint expedition.

rightChoice.text: Politely refuse and go alone

cards.prompt: Your marines board the megastructure, but internal defenses awaken. Automated pylons fire on the boarding party.

rightChoice.text: Push deeper regardless of losses

cards.prompt: Vasari scholars share ancient star-charts pointing to the megastructure's control chamber. In return they ask you to slow your data extraction.

rightChoice.text: Extract data secretly at full speed

cards.prompt: Alone at the rim, your expedition's costs balloon. House Rennick offers financing—if the structure is eventually weaponized.

rightChoice.text: Refuse the strings

cards.prompt: Studying the pylons reveals a resonance key that safely pacifies the defenses. Engineers debate how widely to share the discovery.

rightChoice.text: Keep it a state secret

cards.prompt: Your battered marines reach a vault humming with precursor energy. It could be a reactor—or a weapon core.

rightChoice.text: Attempt to tap its power now

cards.prompt: With Vasari trust earned, they gift you a living precursor archive. But your admirals grumble that you serve aliens over your own houses.

leftChoice.text: Reassure the admirals with a promotion tour

rightChoice.text: Dive into the archive with the Vasari

cards.prompt: Your secret extraction is discovered. The Vasari fleet massing at the rim demands an explanation.

rightChoice.text: Bluff and reinforce your position

cards.prompt: House Rennick's engineers arrive to install weapon retrofits. Your own crews resent the interlopers running your discovery.

rightChoice.text: Keep them on a tight leash

cards.prompt: Broke but proud, you rally your crews to work unpaid for glory. Morale is high, but supplies dwindle fast.

rightChoice.text: Trade precursor trinkets to passing merchants

cards.prompt: The pacified megastructure opens a grand gallery of star-maps. A rival admiral, Corvane, whispers of mutiny to claim the find for himself.

rightChoice.text: Buy his loyalty quietly

cards.prompt: The vault's power surges through the structure. Systems dormant for eons blaze to life across the entire megastructure.

rightChoice.text: Ride the surge to activate everything

cards.prompt: The archive reveals the megastructure is a galaxy-spanning gate network. Whoever controls it commands travel between the stars.

rightChoice.text: Secure the gates for the imperium alone

cards.prompt: The Vasari standoff reaches its breaking point. Their war-priests offer one final chance to prove your intentions are pure.

rightChoice.text: Answer with a show of force

cards.prompt: With Rennick weapons half-installed, precursor guardians reactivate, seeing the retrofits as an attack. Chaos erupts aboard.

leftChoice.text: Strip out the weapons to calm the guardians

rightChoice.text: Fight the guardians with the new arms

cards.prompt: Corvane's faction and loyalists face off in the gallery. The mutiny will decide who speaks for the imperium at the megastructure.

rightChoice.text: Let the factions negotiate a truce

cards.prompt: The megastructure's core intelligence awakens and addresses you directly, asking who you are and what you seek among the stars.

rightChoice.text: Declare yourself its rightful master

cards.prompt: The core offers a choice: it will bond with a single custodian civilization. Your decisions have shaped whether it trusts your imperium.

leftChoice.text: Offer to share it with all peoples

rightChoice.text: Claim the bond for the imperium

cards.prompt: The precursor Loom hums with purpose, its gates aligning to your command. The rim of known space has become the center of a new age—shaped by every choice you made. History will remember how the imperium met the Colossus.

leftChoice.text: Open the gates to a new galactic era

rightChoice.text: Seal the Loom and guard its secrets
